# Code4j Distribution

This directory contains the runnable distribution of Code4j.

## Structure

```
code4j/
├── bin/
│   ├── code4j.cmd   # Windows launcher
│   └── code4j.ps1   # PowerShell launcher
├── lib/
│   └── code4j.jar   # Runnable fat jar
└── README.md
```

## Usage

Add `bin/` to PATH, then run from any project directory:

```powershell
code4j --help
code4j --version
```
